name: iFlytek Spark V3.0 (Xinghuo)
note: Third-gen Spark benchmarked against ChatGPT-3.5, unveiled at the 2023 iFlytek 1024 Developer Festival in Hefei; later rebranded as the API's 'Spark Pro' tier.

results.notes: SuperCLUE December 2023 Leaderboard, rank 15/17, sub-scores OPEN=51.74 / OPT=77.03. Source: CLUEbenchmark/SuperCLUE GitHub README table (row '讯飞星火V3.0 | 科大讯飞 | 59.33 | 51.74 | 77.03 | API').

verificationNotes: Existence and Oct 24, 2023 Hefei release confirmed via chinadaily.com.cn, iflytek.com, and multiple press (PRNewswire, Pandaily). SuperCLUE score of 59.33 (plus 51.74 OPEN / 77.03 OPT sub-scores) for Dec 2023 confirmed by fetching github.com/CLUEbenchmark/SuperCLUE directly - numbers match exactly. 'Rebranded as Spark Pro' claim is plausible per Chinese AI ecosystem reporting but not independently pinned to a single primary source; left in note field (non-critical, unverified nuance) rather than a hard spec.
